query:
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, 
  MIN(periodo_concessivo_fim) as min_conc_fim, 
  MAX(periodo_concessivo_fim) as max_conc_fim,
  SUM(CASE WHEN data_inicio IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_data_inicio,
  SUM(CASE WHEN data_sugerida_inicio IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_data_sugerida
FROM vacation_periods 
GROUP BY status
